programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The methods involved in making springs and pianos, and how they have changed with advances in technology

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The processes involved in manufacturing rope, billiard tables and sailboards, and how advances in technology have led to improved production methods

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five cooks compete for the £1,000 prize in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and keen basketball player Ken Oputa is the first to host, inviting his guests to turn up in sportswear fancy dress. He hopes his Double Dribble mushrooms and Slam Dunk salmon will prove to be winning ingredients

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer Erika Sager hosts the second dinner party of the week on board her boat in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and invites her guests to dress up as pirates. Despite the unconventional setting, her rivals are all impressed by the standard of her food and hospitality

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Sarah Brice hosts the third dinner party in Kingston upon Thames, hoping to impress her guests with her own take on dishes including prawns, lamb and chocolate mousse. Ken Oputa tries to make an impression on the female contestants with his romantic poetry, but finds Erika Sager switches her attentions to his rival Jamie Baker

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Jamie Baker hosts the fourth party in London, and his ambitious menu of langoustine and crab ravioli, herb crusted rack of lamb, and milloux of chocolate - combined with his choice of evening entertainment - go down well, until an unexpected turn of events scuppers his plans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired golfer David Witcher hosts the final evening in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and hopes to impress with an American-themed menu, including Wyoming slow-cooked ribs and Louisiana seafood chowder. After dinner, he entertains his guests with a bucking bronco, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Currina seeks a holiday home along Spain's northern Costa Cálida. With a budget of £65,000 and her best friend Tracey by her side for support, expert Jean Johansson is called upon to pull out all the stops in locating five possible properties. Whether any will prove the perfect one for Currina remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Renuka Joseph is looking for a holiday home where she can entertain family and friends and relax with her husband Clarence. She's originally from Sri Lanka and has chosen the Costa del Sol as her perfect spot because the beaches remind her of home. She's brought her best friend Shanez along to help, so Jasmine Harman shows them five apartments in and around Estepona for her £80,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Torcroft Boutique B&B in Torquay, south Devon, where Phil and Sharon Hobson hope their added extras will help win over their rivals

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple with £100,000 to spend to relocate to the Charente in western France, where they hope to lead a more relaxed life in the countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Katrin and Thomas from London search for a holiday home in the countryside of inland Malaga, where they hope to one day live permanently and enjoy the Spanish lifestyle

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Compilation of reports on store cupboard staples, including Kate Quilton taking a look at the secrets behind peanut butter's long shelf life, solving the mysteries of Marmite's famously divisive flavour, and discovering if it is safe to feed cats dog food and vice versa. Jimmy Doherty travels to Sri Lanka to discover why lentils are sold split rather than whole, and Matt Tebbutt witnesses anchovy fishing off the coast of Italy

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George visits the magnificent and meticulously crafted country retreat of Standen in West Sussex - one of the best examples of the Arts and Crafts design movement to be found anywhere in the world. He discovers a masterpiece of Gothic Revival architecture at Tyntesfield in Somerset, with its acres of flower-filled terraces, and unleashes a medieval catapult at Corfe Castle in Dorset, an iconic ruin who's first stone was laid almost a millennium ago, before risking vertigo with his trusty companion Loki at the highest point on England's south coast - the famous Golden Cap

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant and boxing ring girl Chloe sits down with 'geezer' Anthony, who believes his cheeky wink can charm any woman. Actor Josh seeks a leading lady, but as a dwarf he has struggled to find someone who won't judge him on his height. His date is housing support officer Lori, who at four foot 11 has also found love a challenge. Also, dedicated father Rob is paired with former Butlin's Redcoat Donna. How will she react when he reveals he has 10 children?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of the British Army soldiers who defuse bombs in the UK, providing an insight into the training they receive at 'Bomb School' in Bicester. Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called out at night to a woodland near Clitheroe, where a dog walker has found an explosive dating back to the Second World War. Swansea must make it safe by taking it to a large open field and blowing it up. Sergeant Sam Jones - a veteran of Afghanistan - has seen a spike in the number of calls the bomb squad receive in the UK due to the craze of magnet fishing. Treasure hunters hurl large industrial weights into lakes and canals but often get more than they bargained for, pulling out all manner of potentially deadly explosives including mortar bombs and hand grenades, with one man causing a major incident by disposing of a grenade in a dustbin on the industrial estate where he works

programme.title: 100 Vaginas
programme.desc: Documentary artist Laura Dodsworth photographs 100 women and interviews 18 of the participants, aged between 19 and 77, and asks them about how their vagina has shaped their lives. They share their experiences of starting periods and pubic hair grooming, the trauma of rape and FGM, and the joy of orgasms

programme.title: Superhuman Summer: The Paralympic Rewind
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas and Jonnie Peacock present a celebration of some of the most memorable moments from the 2012 and 2016 Paralympic Games in London and Rio. With guests including Clare Balding, Ade Adepitan, Alex Brooker, Adam Hills and Josh Widdicombe, as well as members of Britain's Paralympics team

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver pulls out all the stops with his 'totally bonkers sausage and mash pie'. It's not a pie with mash on the side, or even a pie with mash on the top - Jamie uses golden mashed potatoes instead of pastry to encase a beautiful leek, sausage and apple stew. Jamie also gives Britain's favourite takeaway, fish and chips, a home makeover that involves no deep-frying, making it both safer and healthier for the family. With help from his son Buddy, Jamie encases the fish in golden breadcrumbs that are shot through with smoky bacon, before serving it with smoked paprika potato wedges, mashed-up green veg and a light minty sauce

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Ray Dodd hosts the first dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but finds his guests a difficult crowd to please. Recruitment executive Michelle Watson turns her nose up at the salmon starter, while choir director Joseph Benneh sends his steak back to the kitchen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment executive Michelle Watson welcomes the diners to her home for the second dinner party of the week in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but the previous night's host Ray Dodd is hungry for revenge following stinging criticism of his efforts. Michelle's cooking also fails to impress Joseph Benneh, so her hopes of scooping the week's prize rest with her choice of entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stuart Henson hosts a safari-themed dinner party on the third night in Milton Keynes. He hopes his exotic menu of zebra steak and 'elephant dung surprise' will please his guests, but after the insults of the previous night he faces a difficult challenge to persuade his fellow diners to get along

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Choir director Joseph Benneh hosts the fourth dinner party in Milton Keynes, hoping the flavours from his homeland Ghana and a vocal masterclass will prove a winning combination. The guests' expectations are high, so he is under pressure to hit the spot with a menu that includes chicken liver pate, and groundnut soup with coconut rice

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Country enthusiast Susan Rogers hosts the final dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, hoping her French cuisine will win her extra points. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin assists Joanna and Scott, who met 18 years ago in southern Spain while they were on a golfing trip, and are now searching for a home on the Costa Blanca

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Chambers from Redditch, Worcestershire, started their family young, but now their four children have grown up, they've decided to recapture their youth and buy a place in Spain where they can enjoy time in the sun - just the two of them. For their budget of £45,000 Laura Hamilton shows them five apartments in and around the town of Torrevieja, but will any of them be their perfect place?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the 600-year-old Rhydspence Inn in Herefordshire, where the medieval character proves charming, although the everyday practicalities prove painful for some

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit the Cotswolds, where they unearth a mystery item that looks like a fish tank but turns out to have a very different use entirely

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro, to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Michael and Helen from Shropshire believe that the time is right to relocate to Spain, where they are looking for a new forever home in the province of Valencia

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Rita and Stephen from Watford find a holiday home in the Portuguese town of Albufeira, showing them five options within their budget of £150,000

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Persian cat that has been hit by a car, requiring treatments involving a skin graft and putting its crushed bones back together. Meanwhile, a rescue dog has a cancerous tumour in his jaw removed, and a young staffie-cross needs treatment for a developmental elbow disease

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017)
programme.desc: Secret agents Eggsy and Merlin join forces with their US counterparts to bring down a psychotic femme fatale. Thankfully they are assisted by a veteran hero brought back from the dead. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Taron Egerton, Colin Firth, Mark Strong and Julianne Moore

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad

Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called out at night to a woodland near Clitheroe, where a dog walker has found an explosive dating back to the Second World War. Sergeant Sam Jones - a veteran of Afghanistan - has seen a spike in the number of calls the bomb squad receive in the UK due to the craze of magnet fishing. Treasure hunters hurl large industrial weights into lakes and canals but often get more than they bargained for, pulling out all manner of potentially deadly explosives including mortar bombs and hand grenades, with one man causing a major incident by disposing of a grenade in a dustbin on the industrial estate where he works

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: The work of council workers in Southwark, south London, one of the biggest housing associations in the country. The officers tackle fly-tipping, including 40 tons of rubbish dumped on council land that had been cleared for building new homes. An ageing estate is planned for demolition, meaning 10,000 residents are moving - but it's a sad day for many, including a couple leaving their family home of 50 years. And hoarding manager Laurna helps a scholar whose thousands of books have overtaken his home

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant and boxing ring girl Chloe sits down with 'geezer' Anthony, who believes his cheeky wink can charm any woman. Actor Josh seeks a leading lady, but as a dwarf he has struggled to find someone who won't judge him on his height. His date is housing support officer Lori, who at four foot 11 has also found love a challenge. Also, dedicated father Rob is paired with former Butlin's Redcoat Donna. How will she react when he reveals he has 10 children?

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: The chances of a 25 to 35-year-old person owning a home have halved in the last 20 years, while millions of over-sixties are sitting on empty rooms, so here young and old tackle Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. In this third instalment, dog groomer Liah-Rose moves home and business to Reading and pensioner landlords Carolynne and David's high-octane lifestyle. Meanwhile, Jake from Middlesbrough heads for 61-year-old Christene's place in Pontefract, West Yorkshire

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: On St Mary's, Charlotte Hicks returns to the place of her birth to become the Isles of Scilly's only midwife, and the first mum due to give birth off the Cornish coast is her childhood friend Meriel King. At the edge of Dartmoor National Park, woodman John Williamson takes on new apprentice Jordan Harris, and Torquay's harbour master Nick Burns needs to replace a 140-metre section of harbour that will help protect the millions of pounds worth of yachts berthing in the winter months

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair and beauty tutor April Richards hosts the first dinner party in Birmingham. She plans a starter of zebra meat, but the dish does not go down well with employment adviser Paz Thakrar, who is a strict vegetarian and thinks that even eating vegetables is cruel

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Scientist John Fennel hosts the second party in Birmingham, and decides to prepare an ambitious menu that makes use of his skills in the lab. His culinary experiments include the use of soda-siphoned fish batter, a specially crafted fire-maker, a tandoor chimney, and ice-cream made with nitrogen oxide

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in Birmingham is hosted by banker Vanessa Erigbogbo, who describes herself as a brilliant cook. She hopes to impress her guests with a classy menu of lobster, confit of duck, and fried grasshopper canapes, but forgets to cater for a vegetarian diner

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Strict vegetarian Paz Thakrar hosts the penultimate dinner party in Birmingham, but his meat-eating guests show little enthusiasm for the menu and are further displeased by the idea of a karaoke session afterwards

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Insolvency administrator Toni Shukla hosts the final dinner party in Birmingham, and appears to have a good chance of securing the £1,000 prize after her rivals' unsuccessful evenings. However, her lack of cookery knowledge threatens to scupper her hopes of gaining the most points

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple with £100,000 to spend to relocate to the Charente in western France, where they hope to lead a more relaxed life in the countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Keen walkers Rosie and Michael Mulroy from Durham are looking for a holiday home from which they can explore the stunning Andalusian hills and countryside around Frigiliana in southern Spain. Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for their £120,000 budget, from town centre apartments to quaint village townhouses, but will any of them appeal to both heart and head?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Copper Beech House are first to host and Steve and Kathy want Phil to swallow his synthetic sausage comment

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Chiltern Hills in Buckinghamshire to meet Adam and Mandy, who run a classic car restoration business. Henry uncovers an anvil, while Simon finds an old brown dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray end up with the mother of all guilt trips when they decide not to help Marie with a home project so they can land a prime spot on the golf course

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ravin and Pritti from Surrey find a new permanent home for themselves and their family in Gran Canaria, lining up five options within their budget of £180,000

Whether any will prove the perfect one for Currina remains to be seen

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: On St Mary's, Charlotte Hicks returns to the place of her birth to become the Isles of Scilly's only midwife, and the first mum due to give birth off the Cornish coast is her childhood friend Meriel King. At the edge of Dartmoor National Park, woodman John Williamson takes on new apprentice Jordan Harris, and Torquay's harbour master Nick Burns needs to replace a 140-metre section of harbour that will help protect the millions of pounds worth of yachts berthing in the winter months

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on shows including (Un)well, When Harry Met Sally, Countdown, Britain's Got Talent, Mary Berry's Simple Comforts, Elephant Hospital, BBC news reports on quarantine, and young people and Covid, and ITV news coverage of Brexit

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take part in the charity culinary challenge, under the watchful eye of presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding, and judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. For the signature round, they must prepare a batch of decorated traybakes, while the technical challenge involves a classic British staple. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must create a scene out of biscuits depicting what they wanted to be when they grew up

programme.title: 100 Vaginas
programme.desc: Documentary artist Laura Dodsworth photographs 100 women and interviews 18 of the participants, aged between 19 and 77, and asks them about how their vagina has shaped their lives. They share their experiences of starting periods and pubic hair grooming, the trauma of rape and FGM, and the joy of orgasms

programme.title: When Cruises Go Wrong
programme.desc: In a typical tourist season, around two million British people will take to the seas for the holiday of a lifetime promising class, elegance and refinement. However, as this documentary reveals, it's not always plain sailing. Cameras capture the downside of cruising, from sickness and crime to terrifying weather, collisions and emergency evacuations

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and his boss Mr Stein join forces with Karen to form an anti-romance club, while Grace decides to make a sexy video for Leo. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing, with a guest appearance by Gene Wilder

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael tries to provide a confidence-booster for Jay, who is feeling inadequate following a meeting with a former cheerleader they knew at school. Meanwhile, Junior gets trapped in the girls' locker room. American comedy, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The Kyle and Tyler families compete against each nother in a bowling tournament, and Junior develops a crush on his opponents' daughter

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: North West claimants struggling against medical and psychological issues while getting by on benefits. Blackpool martial arts enthusiast Mark hopes to get back into paid employment after being dismissed for breaking a colleague's nose, while Liverpool couple Clive and Sheila want to tie the knot on a benefits budget. Autistic Fleetwood man William struggles to get round due to a bad back and varicose veins. He needs a mobility scooter but has benefits have been cut

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Claimants from across the generations, including a 32-year-old former fisherman and his 20-year-old partner who need a bigger home for their five-strong family, and a 57-year-old former welder now struggling to find permanent employment. Plus, a Hastings woman who, after 10 years on the dole, has started to claim her pension and is living comfortably - and now she has a dream of breaking into the music industry

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan and Tom have their hands full with a driver who is four times over the limit and still refuses to come quietly even when he's bundled into the back of the police car. Sophie and Adie stop a carload of lads at five in the morning and the driver is over the limit, but it's what's down his trousers that is more of a concern

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves in a tense stand-off with suspected drug dealers who could be armed, with German shepherd Tia sent in to search and discovering more than the unit bargained for. programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis turns his attention to violence on the streets of Britain that is fuelled by drink or drugs, and finds out how technological advances are helping to fight crime and secure convictions. In Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, a CCTV operator spots a man being punched unconscious after escaping a mass brawl and does her best to keep track of the assailant and direct the police to him. There is also footage of a fight in which a man is knocked to the floor and a woman wearing stilettos stamps on his face, and an incident outside a burger bar escalates into a relentless and violent assault

Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner

Karen and Paul lost their launderette business and are now rebuilding their home - the only problem is, they believe the house is haunted - and things are looking up for newlyweds Andy and Diane

programme.desc: Six unemployed families and individuals are given a cash lump sum of £26,000 - and in return they must sign off from the benefits system to see if they can use the money to secure long-term prosperity. Southend single parent Donna also has plans to go into business, while for cancer survivor Kim and her partner Adam, just returning to normality is enough. Can they make the most of their cash injection?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A gang of burglars breaks into a house and takes the keys to luxury cars. After the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles, multiple teams hunt them down with the police chopper. The first burglar is caught after a lengthy pursuit of a stolen Mercedes, which he abandons before running straight into the path of waiting officers. Once the occupants of a second stolen Merc are apprehended by the chopper team, Ben and Warren go after the third vehicle - which they are stunned to witness burst into flames

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers go in pursuit of a driver who is so drunk that he can't even keep his car on the road and the chase ends with shocking results. programme.title: World's
programme.desc: Unbelievable motoring moments caught on camera, featuring a man who demolished 23 buildings in his customised bulldozer and a hit-and-run driver who smashed through a plate-glass cafe window, pinning a customer against the counter in the process. Plus, caravan banger racing, scary parking and joyriding in a tank. Vicki Butler-Henderson provides expert analysis on the wheel-spinning clips, while eyewitnesses and those who survived tell their stories

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Extreme Flights: Out of Control

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Mac recognises the victim as conspiracy-obsessed Tessa James, and as he works to explore whether there was truth in her stories, the investigation leads to an elite gentlemen's club that has traces of blood on the walls. Starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found dead in his bed, and the team receive an anonymous tip that he was murdered. Logan and Briscoe encounter difficulties at the scene when the widow and her attorney refuse to allow an autopsy. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy vows to find those responsible when a key witness to the killing of a drug dealer is shot dead. Suspicion falls on the accused's cousin, a local hoodlum with a number of charges to his name, and another associate who refuses to make a deal with the investigators. Sam Waterson, Elisabeth Rohm and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A cross-dresser is suspected of killing and dismembering a cantankerous former boxer - but the team is unable to find vital body parts, making it impossible for the medical examiner to prove the case is murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. The pair learn the foreign widow married in the hope of a better life, but fell in love with a co-worker - and out of favour with her husband

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. When it appears the abductor knew about the power cut in advance, the possibility of the manipulation of energy is called into question

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs tries to extract information from a convict on death row about where he hid the bodies of his victims. However, the killer proves reluctant to confess, forcing the team to solve the case by unconventional means. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a marine's wife is shown live on the internet and inquiries point to two housewives who were running their own pornographic website, but have since vanished. The search for the missing pair begins with the website administrator - and ends with a surprising discovery

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A vengeful loan shark kidnaps the family of a financier who owes him money. Unfortunately, Goren and Eames have a tough time proving that an abduction has even taken place, chiefly because the terrified man has been told his daughters will be killed if he talks

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is found strangled in his car in an area notorious for prostitution. Benson is shocked to realise she briefly dated the victim and refuses to believe he would have paid for sex. As investigations get under way, DNA evidence reveals the dead man might have been gay. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. A discovery about the victim's mentor places him at the top of their list of suspects - but as further evidence is gathered, it begins to seem that someone might have tried to frame him for the crime

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man is arrested for assaulting his alcoholic wife, who is pregnant - but changes the focus of the case by trying to have her charged with neglect for drinking while expecting a baby. As Benson investigates, he discovers a child had previously been exposed to the harmful consequences of her thoughtless actions

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a poster boy for a pressure group that tries to steer gay people towards heterosexuality. Suspicion falls on a cleric who was conducting a hate-mail campaign against the victim - but it transpires he has a watertight alibi. George Segal guest stars

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Lindsay receives a combat cross medal for bravery, and new recruit Jo Danville stumbles over a body in the crime lab on her first day in the role. The detectives discover the victim worked in one of the building's other offices, and Adam finds evidence suggesting death was premeditated. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder on a video chat website, and the team races to the victim's apartment, where a search reveals a significant clue - her laptop has gone missing. Inquiries eventually lead to a college professor who implicates the dead girl's boyfriend - and as the case unfolds, it emerges that the killer is lining up a second victim. Crime drama, starring AJ Buckley, Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A popular girl at an exclusive school is murdered and an examination of her clothes reveals evidence of a substance that Adam believes could only have come from Mars. The detectives discover a male pupil is in possession of a lizard that may be responsible for the strange traces and an exploration of his link to the victim uncovers incidences of jealousy and bullying

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a superintendent is found in the basement of his building, leading Logan and Briscoe to suspect his death was the result of a break-in gone wrong. However, forensic evidence points the finger of suspicion at the victim's 17-year-old son, who Dr Olivet believes is an abusive sociopath. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor is murdered shortly before she is due to testify at the trial of a former SS Officer stationed at a concentration camp, forcing McCoy to consider who stood to gain the most from the old woman's death - the alleged war criminal, or a music producer promoting racist records

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected district attorney is found dead in Central Park - and as Briscoe and Green investigate, they discover he was actually living under an assumed identity, and had never graduated from law school. To complicate matters, further inquiries link his murder to that of a journalist 10 years previously. Guest starring Michael Bloomberg

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the body of an elderly woman is found, suspicion turns to her at-home carer and her boyfriend. Evidence quickly begins to suggest the 82-year-old was starved to death, prompting Stone's eye to turn to the victim's granddaughter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant security guard is injured when a package explodes at a scientific research lab, prompting Green and Lupo to investigate a chemist's latest experiments. It transpires that research is being undertaken to establish whether it is possible to isolate the 'gay gene' in unborn foetuses. Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green are called to the scene after a white teenage boy and a black girl are killed in a shooting near a neighbourhood playground. However, progress is slow when the detectives find locals unwilling to talk about the events, but two brothers who were friends of the murdered boy point them towards a suspect. Jeremy Sisto and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents set out to find the stolen body of a Civil War general, but Dr Elaine Burns is shocked to discover the entombed corpse of a Marine sergeant instead, eventually reaching the conclusion he was buried alive. Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson tries to reason with a woman who has taken a man hostage, while the team discovers the reasons for her desperate actions

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Munch becomes personally involved in the prosecution of a terminally ill embryologist who is accused of assisting a depressed woman in committing suicide. Evidence points overwhelmingly to her guilt - but the jury finds it hard to decide her fate. Hard-hitting police drama, guest starring Marlee Matlin

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of an elderly woman who they learn was dying of cancer but had been determined to live out her final days to the full - a philosophy that encompassed dating a variety of men. Discovering her most recent gentleman callers all have alibis, they turn their attention to the murder weapon and realise they are looking for a serial killer. Anthony Rapp and Jane Krakowski guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A wealthy philanthropist who was accused of rape and kidnap is killed. A former supermodel whose daughter was attacked is blamed for the murder - but Benson is alarmed to find herself implicated by the defendant's wily attorney. Jacqueline Bisset guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple are attacked in their home, and while the male victim is found dead at the scene, Mac is able to question the severely injured wife, who identifies her own son as the assailant. However, a convicted drug dealer confesses to the crime, forcing the team to investigate his motives. Guest starring Marcos De la Cruz (Sons of Anarchy)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The head of a notorious Puerto Rican gang is found dead outside a hotel shortly after his predecessor is released from jail. Mac is forced to use his diplomatic skills to prevent a revenge attack - but a second death and an ambush on a police car lead him to believe the killer is a disgruntled insider. Drama, starring Gary Sinise, with Edward James Olmos (Battlestar Galactica, Blade Runner)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a woman's murder could be the work of a serial killer, while Mac reconnects with his first partner, who is being stalked by an ex-con the pair put behind bars. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda, with Gary Sinise

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bomb is planted in a Wall Street car park, and a woman is apprehended in connection with the crime. However, Stone and Kincaid work to prove the culprit had been brainwashed by Daniel Hendricks, the charismatic leader of a sinister religious cult. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bar-room brawl results in a baseball player being killed, leading Briscoe and Green to suspect a sporting grudge is behind the killing. However, a very different vendetta comes to light as the evidence points to a man recently exonerated after serving 20 years in prison for murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Jerry Orbach's final appearance in the crime drama. Briscoe's investigation into the killing of a delivery man uncovers the married victim's involvement in a website arranging romantic liaisons between consenting adults, and reveals the deceased's wife had recently purchased a gun

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Stone and the team battle against the closed ranks of the Navy when they are called in to investigate the death of a female officer during a wild party. Julianna Margulies (The Good Wife) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a Navy reservist returns home to find her husband missing and her living room covered in blood, and make a grim discovery when they find a finger in the bin. Meanwhile, Ziva ruffles a few feathers by insisting on continuing her investigation into the murder of her father, asking for permission to go to Rome on the trail of the chief suspect. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: An old enemy of Angie fakes his own death, then hires her to investigate who is trying to kill him. Guest starring William Shatner

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. She believes her son is innocent and is merely trying to prove he is not guilty by forcing his 'victim' to go back on his lies. Starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigations reveal that the murder of a college student was linked to his role as pledgemaster of his fraternity, but Stabler and Benson are mystified when the murdered boy's father agrees to represent the accused. Drama, guest starring Serena Williams, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Benidorm stars Sherrie Hewson and Tony Maudsley seek fortune in Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire. Providing guidance are dealer Roo Irvine and auctioneer Tim Medhurst. They'll finish at auction in North Hykeham, but first music lover Tony joins a merry band of toy soldiers in Melton Mowbray. Meanwhile, food lover Sherrie learns about one of the country's oldest biscuits - Grantham Gingerbreads

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties in Redhill in Surrey, Sittingbourne in Kent and Prenton in Liverpool before they are sold at auction. Later, the presenters meet the new owners - which includes a father and daughter team, a mother and her son and a pair of cousins - and find out what plans they have for the houses

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a mid-terrace house in Derby, a flat in Surrey and a two-bedroom cottage in Burnley, Lancashire. The buyers also discuss their plans for the properties

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell visit the Peak District, where they hunt down treasure in the antiques shops across Derbyshire and beyond

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell visit the antiques shops of Yorkshire, along the way meeting a trombone-maker and discovering the history of the rocking horse

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Upcycling entrepreneur Sarah Moore salvages three skip-bound items from the recycling centre in Witley. To help her give them a new lease of life, Bristol Upholstery Collective gets busy with a box of patchwork pieces, and furniture restyler Emma Walker is challenged with putting her stamp on a dull dressing table. Sarah gives new life to a doll's house in her own project, but will she be able to find new homes for all her items?

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard checks out unlikely animal items at Edinburgh Zoo, rummages through a historic textile mill in the Scottish borders for industrial furniture and visits friends in Bristol

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Charles Jantzen leads the biggest horse rescue of the year, while investigator Trischa Price comes to the aid of a dog left at home alone

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Charles Jantzen leads an investigation into a kennel suspected of housing more than 50 ill-treated dogs

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Yorkshire Air Ambulance races to save a motorist who has been trapped in his car for hours. A cyclist is badly injured after falling off his bike

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 43-year-old man is flown in for treatment after falling three metres off a shipping container. Doctors look over a father of two who has suffered a freak accident

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Restoration expert EJ Osborne rescues three items from Woking Recycling Centre, including four metal chairs, unwanted mirrors and a tired towel rail

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery, but feels more at home when she spots something from the 1970s. Philip opts for some typically 'Serrell' items, as well as chewing over more prehistoric stuff. He also goes out of his way to prove that chivalry isn't dead. On the road, Philip visits a factory using the world-famous Sheffield steel to make some very fine tools, and Natasha heads to the woods for a spot of foraging and some free food. It's going to be a nail biter at their final auction at Lytham St Annes, Lancashire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Anita Manning and Paul Laidlaw set off on a search for items around the Trossachs in Stirlingshire, buying a spoon, a stool and a soda syphon along the way

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's Renovate Don't Relocate
programme.desc: A divorced mother-of-two bought her dream home in East Sussex more than 20 years ago. Money is tight but she wants to upgrade the upstairs rooms so she can take in a lodger

programme.title: Cash in the Spare Room
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Moore and small-space expert Max McMurdo help people across the UK turn the unused spaces in their homes into money-spinning holiday lets

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: The team travels to New Jersey to explore the paranormal history of Cape May, focusing on the holiday town's infamous Emlyn Physick Estate

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin continue their search of paranormal activity, and visit the Bell Witch Cave in Tennessee

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team ventures into the cellars of Beaumanor Hall, where each member of the party experiences something unexplained

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Anita Manning and Paul Laidlaw set off on a search for items around the Trossachs in Stirlingshire, buying a spoon, a stool and a soda syphon along the way

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Countryfile presenters Charlotte Smith and Tom Heap swap agriculture for antiques as they search Hampshire and Buckinghamshire for bargain collectibles, assisted by auctioneers James Braxton and Phil Serrell. Their final destination is an auction in Winchester - but before that, Tom turns woodworker as he learns the ancient craft of 'bodging' in the Chiltern hills, while Charlotte meets the famous Aylesbury duck - common to the area for 300 years and the inspiration behind Jemima Puddle-Duck

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developer Martin Roberts visits the Midlands and Cumbria to meet a couple and a man who are all determined to make money from their property investments. Meanwhile, Lucy Alexander is serenaded by an opera singer who develops properties in his spare time

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a three-storey terrace in Mid Glamorgan, a three-bedroom cottage in Yorkshire and a maisonette in Devon. All have been sold at auction, and the presenters will be finding out who bought them, what they paid and what their plans are for the new acquisitions

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery, but feels more at home when she spots something from the 1970s. programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Restoration expert EJ Osborne rescues three items from Woking Recycling Centre, including four metal chairs, unwanted mirrors and a tired towel rail

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard mixes with aristocracy at a Cornwall estate where he is blown away by a collection of classic cars. In Newark, Nottinghamshire, he finds a huge hoard of enamel signs for the oil industry

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Charles Jantzen seizes some emaciated horses that were forced to eat dirt to survive. Two of the mares have foals and are struggling to produce milk to feed them

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: An emaciated horse gives birth prematurely, and the foal is so weak Dr Thurston takes it home to bottle feed

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Cameras follow the flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance, who cover thousands of square miles of rugged landscapes, dramatic dales and bleak moors

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's Renovate Don't Relocate
programme.desc: A divorced mother-of-two bought her dream home in East Sussex more than 20 years ago. Money is tight but she wants to upgrade the upstairs rooms so she can take in a lodger

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore sees what people are about to throw away at Dunbar Recycling Centre, rescuing a set of drawers, an unwanted computer desk and an old accordion case for transformation

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning visit the Islands and Lowlands of Scotland. Paul uncovers a festive antique, while Anita is caught by the gaze of a former Lord Provost of Kilmarnock

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Paul Laidlaw search for antiques to sell at auction in Cumbria. Anita comes across a Victorian mechanical pencil, and Paul finds a watch from the Second World War

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits
programme.desc: The crew head to Bountiful, Utah, to investigate an abandoned house. Locals claim serial killer Ted Bundy murdered one of his victims in the residence

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown with Nick Groff
programme.desc: Drawn to small town Iowa by reports of aggressive shadow figures, ghost hunters Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman visit Malvern Manor for 72 hours to capture evidence

programme.title: Haunted Towns

But all is not as it seems, as a new neighbour seems set to discover. Drama, starring an Oscar-winning Meryl Streep alongside Kevin Kline and Peter MacNicol

programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. programme.title: Fight Night
programme.desc: George Groves v Andrea Di Luisa. Another chance to see the bout for the vacant WBC International Super Middleweight title at the Copper Box in London. Home favourite Groves will have been hoping to bounce back immediately following his split-decision loss to Badou Jack for the WBC World title, which took place in September on the undercard of Floyd Mayweather Jr v Andre Berto in Las Vegas. A convincing win over Italian opponent Di Luisa would put Groves back on track for a fourth world title shot - potentially versus his old foe James DeGale, who holds the IBF belt

programme.desc: An interview with the former boxer, who reigned supreme in the featherweight division in the latter half of the 1990s, but came unstuck when he faced Marco Antonio Barrera. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Washington Redskins' 1987 Super Bowl victory over Denver Broncos at the Jack Murphy Stadium in San Diego, California. Despite trailing the Broncos 10-0 at the end of the first quarter, the Redskins battled back in spectacular fashion, scoring 35 unanswered points in the second quarter alone, as they went on to a secure a memorable 42-10 victory

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of San Francisco 49ers' 1988 Super Bowl success over Cincinnati Bengals at the Joe Robbie Stadium in Miami, Florida. This game is remembered for the 49ers' winning drive in the last few minutes of the game when, trailing 16-13 and with the ball on their own eight-yard line, quarterback Joe Montana led his team down the field and threw the winning touchdown pass with seconds to spare
